text:
Created attachment 242523
efi UART console  on RK356x  is broken

Now in latest source tree it is broken, set console="comconsole" is not working.

1. Firefly - Station P2/M2
2. FriendlyELEC NanoPi R5C/R5S
3. Radxa - Rock-3A/E23/E25
4. Pine64 Quartz64
